title: Add security and correctness linters to golangci-lint
summary: Review of commit b6c4989 addressing berendt's review #2 feedback. W-002 (partial r.Client.Get refactoring) is correctly resolved by reverting all 4 instances back to r.Client.Get, restoring consistency with the ~40 instances across the codebase. W-001 (gosec G703 nolint) was correctly disputed — G703 does fire on os.Stat with tainted input (verified by temporarily removing the directive and running golangci-lint). However, the 5-line REVIEWER-DISAGREEMENT block comment added to source code is review process meta-commentary that does not belong in production code, and contains German text violating the English-only rule.

tests_checklist.item: make lint passes with exit code 0 across all 3 modules

code_quality_checklist.item: No review meta-commentary in production source code

security_checklist.item: gosec G703 suppression justified — path from env var, not user input

architecture_checklist.item: Changes scoped to addressing review feedback only

issues_found.description: REVIEWER-DISAGREEMENT block comment is review process meta-commentary that does not belong in production source code. The 5-line comment discusses the review back-and-forth, contains German text ('Reviewer: bitte prüfen'), and duplicates information that belongs in the PR conversation. The inline //nolint:gosec // G703: ... comment already provides sufficient justification for the suppression.
issues_found.fix: Remove the entire 5-line REVIEWER-DISAGREEMENT block comment (lines 81-85). The existing inline nolint comment on line 86 is correct and self-documenting. Review disagreements should be documented in PR comments, not source code.

suggested_improvements: The review pattern file .planwerk/review_patterns/standardize-access-patterns-when-partially-refactoring.md (created in a prior commit) states the fix was 'Standardized all test reconciler calls to use the promoted method r.Get' — but the actual fix in this commit reverted to r.Client.Get. Consider updating the pattern file's fix description to match reality.
next_steps: Remove the 5-line REVIEWER-DISAGREEMENT block comment from setup.go:81-85, keeping only the inline nolint:gosec // G703 comment on line 86
